insight_tenant_id.title: Insight Tenant ID
insight_tenant_id.description: Tenant isolation identifier for the ingestion layer.

hubspot_access_token.title: Private App Access Token
hubspot_access_token.description: HubSpot Private App access token. Create under Settings → Integrations → Private Apps. Token must have CRM + properties read scopes for every enabled stream.

hubspot_start_date.title: Start Date
hubspot_start_date.description: UTC start for initial incremental sync. Accepts YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ. Records with updatedAt older than this are skipped on first run. Omit to fall back to 2 years before now.

hubspot_streams.title: Streams Override
hubspot_streams.description: Optional list of stream names to sync (e.g. contacts, companies, deals). Overrides the curated default. Use for per-tenant customization.

hubspot_stream_slice_step.title: Stream Slice Step
hubspot_stream_slice_step.description: ISO-8601 duration for concurrent cursor slice width. Smaller = more parallelism, more API calls. Default P30D (30 days). Shrink to PT1H for large orgs that hit the 10k search-result cap inside a single time slice.

hubspot_lookback_window.title: Lookback Window
hubspot_lookback_window.description: ISO-8601 duration to re-read before the cursor position each sync (accounts for hs_lastmodifieddate eventual consistency on HubSpot Search). Default PT10M.

hubspot_num_workers.title: Concurrent Workers
hubspot_num_workers.description: Max concurrent stream slice fetches. Clamped to [1, 50]. Default 20. HubSpot burst limits: 10 rps (standard) or 100 rps (Enterprise); search endpoint caps at 4 rps portal-wide.

hubspot_include_archived.title: Include Archived
hubspot_include_archived.description: Include archived (soft-deleted) records in Bronze. Adds a second pass per object with archived=true. Default true for completeness.
